commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 8:33 And Ner begat Kish, and Kish begat Saul, and Saul begat Jonathan, and Malchi-shua, and Abinadab, and Esh-baal. Ner, son of Abiel, or of Jeheil, prince of Gabaon, ver. (Haydock) From Aphia sprung Bechorah, Seror, Abiel, (1 Kings ix. ) who is also called Ner and Jehiel. He had Ner, the father of Abner, and Cis, father of Saul. (Menochius) Abinadab, or Jessui, 1 Kings xiv. (Calmet) Esbaal, alias Isboseth. (Challoner) The Hebrews avoid pronouncing the name of the idol, and substitute boseth, "confusion. "(Calmet) Hence it is clear that many had two names.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
